zh-CN.name: 海棠花
zh-CN.intro: 海棠花是春天开的花，花瓣粉粉的，像小朋友的脸蛋。它香香的，长在树上，一朵一朵的，特别好看。

story.title: 🌸海棠花的春天舞会
story.body: 春天来了，花园里的海棠树醒了。树上冒出许多粉红色的小花苞，像害羞的小姑娘。暖暖的春风吹过，小花苞一个个咧开了嘴，露出粉嫩的花瓣。一朵海棠花轻轻地说：“春天真美，我想和朋友们一起跳舞！”许多小蜜蜂飞来了，它们嗡嗡嗡地唱起歌。海棠花们手拉手，在枝头摇啊摇，跳起了春天的舞会。太阳公公看见了，笑眯眯地说：“你们是春天里最香的小仙子！”

knowledge.title: 海棠花为什么香香的？
knowledge.body: 因为它的花瓣里有小小的香腺，能放出好闻的气味。这样就能吸引小蜜蜂来采蜜，帮它传播花粉，结出小果子。

en.name: Crabapple
en.intro: Crabapple is a spring flower with soft pink petals that look like a little blush. It grows on trees, smells sweet, and blooms in lovely clusters.

story.title: 🌸The Crabapple's Spring Dance
story.body: Spring arrived, and the crabapple tree in the garden woke up. Many pink little buds appeared on the branches, like shy little girls. A warm breeze blew, and the buds smiled open, showing their soft pink petals. One crabapple flower said softly, "Spring is so beautiful! I want to dance with my friends!" Many little bees came buzzing, humming a sweet song. The crabapple flowers held hands and swayed on the branches, dancing in the spring ball. Mr. Sun looked down and said with a smile, "You are the sweetest little fairies of spring!"

knowledge.title: Why are crabapple flowers fragrant?
knowledge.body: Because they have tiny scent glands in their petals that release a sweet smell. This attracts bees to help pollinate the flowers, so they can grow little fruits.
